---
title: "Introduction"
---

::: {.intro-hero}
<img src="./images/rockstedy-logo.png" alt="Rocksteady Analytics rhino logo" class="about-brand-logo">
<p class="intro-hero-title">Medallion Fund Reconstruction</p>
:::

**Quantitative archaeology from public evidence only.**

## What this project is

This site is an **evidence-graded public reconstruction** of the scientific, statistical, computational, organizational, and market mechanisms that could plausibly explain Renaissance Technologies’ Medallion Fund historical performance.

We assemble fragmented **public** sources—journalism, academic microstructure theory, regulatory filings, historical market data descriptions, and reproducible toy experiments—into a coherent explanatory framework. Every major claim is tied to the [evidence registry](appendices/evidence-registry.qmd) with rubric metadata (evidence level, source quality, replication status).

## What we are not doing

- Obtaining or inferring proprietary RenTech systems, source code, or confidential data
- Impersonating Renaissance Technologies or claiming insider knowledge
- Providing investment advice or live trading infrastructure
- Treating performance anecdotes as audited facts without labeling uncertainty

## How to read the site

| Element | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| **Evidence levels (E0–E4)** | How strongly a claim is supported by public material (see registry) |
| **Phases I–VIII** | Eight research chapters from history through synthesis |
| **Appendices** | [Evidence registry](appendices/evidence-registry.qmd), [signal database](appendices/signal-database.qmd), [bibliography](appendices/bibliography.qmd) |
| **Claim links** | Hover `[[claim:CLM-*]]` references for quick claim text; click opens the registry |

## Start here

1. **[Home](index.qmd)** — mission, chapter map, and how to reproduce locally
2. **[Phase I — History](chapters/01-history.qmd)** — timeline and strategy evolution
3. **[Evidence registry](appendices/evidence-registry.qmd)** — all claims with rubric fields

<p class="site-credit">Site by <strong>Nate Vavrock</strong> · <strong>Rocksteady Analytics</strong></p>

Legal disclaimer and licenses: [About](about.qmd).
